creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

this is an update to 2024.11.

Changelog:

Maintenance Release:

- Added option for using "4GB Patch" to apply an 4GB virtual memory patch for 32-bit applications.
- Getting more CLI friendly: The installation process is now full visibly when issuing one in a console and will not show a GUI progress bar.

Special thanks to @KiwiDch for spotting and fixing the following issues :

- Fixed proper parsing of Setup and Runtime environment variables (#41)
- Do not clear config file when editing is canceled (#43)

Thank you in advance!
